name: Active Subscribers
sql:
SELECT
    s.full_name as name,
    s.email,
    pr.product_name as product,
    printf('$%.2f', last_pay.amount_paid) as last_amount,
    date(last_pay.created) as last_payment,
    CAST(julianday('now') - julianday(last_pay.created) AS INTEGER) as days_ago,
    printf('$%.2f', s.total_spend) as lifetime_spend,
    date(s.first_purchase) as member_since,
    CAST((julianday('now') - julianday(s.first_purchase)) / 30.44 AS INTEGER) as months_enrolled
FROM subscriptions s
JOIN products pr ON pr.id = s.product_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT customer_id, product_id, amount_paid, created,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id, product_id ORDER BY created DESC) as rn
    FROM purchases WHERE amount_paid > 0
) last_pay ON last_pay.customer_id = s.customer_id AND last_pay.product_id = s.product_id AND last_pay.rn = 1
WHERE s.subscription_active = 1
  AND pr.product_name != 'The Yoga Lifestyle: On-demand Library'
ORDER BY last_pay.created DESC

name: Cancelled Subscribers
sql:
SELECT
    c.full_name as name,
    c.email,
    p.product_name as product,
    printf('$%.2f', p.amount_paid) as last_amount,
    date(p.created) as last_payment,
    p.is_stripe_subscription as stripe_sub_id,
    CASE WHEN p.is_paused THEN 'Paused' ELSE 'Cancelled' END as status
FROM (
    SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id, product_id ORDER BY created DESC) as rn
    FROM purchases
    WHERE is_canceled = 1
      AND recurring_type IS NOT NULL
) p
JOIN customers c ON c.id = p.customer_id
WHERE p.rn = 1
ORDER BY p.created DESC

name: Monthly Revenue
sql:
SELECT
    strftime('%Y-%m', created) as month,
    COUNT(*) as transactions,
    COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) as customers,
    printf('$%.2f', SUM(amount_paid)) as revenue,
    printf('$%.2f', AVG(amount_paid)) as avg_amount
FROM purchases
WHERE amount_paid > 0
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month DESC

name: Revenue by Product
sql:
SELECT
    product_name,
    recurring_type,
    COUNT(*) as transactions,
    COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) as customers,
    printf('$%.2f', SUM(amount_paid)) as total_revenue,
    printf('$%.2f', AVG(amount_paid)) as avg_payment
FROM purchases
WHERE amount_paid > 0
GROUP BY product_id
ORDER BY SUM(amount_paid) DESC

name: Subscriber Price Tiers
sql:
SELECT
    printf('$%.2f', last_pay.amount_paid) as monthly_rate,
    COUNT(*) as subscribers,
    GROUP_CONCAT(c.full_name, ', ') as names
FROM product_students ps
JOIN customers c ON c.id = ps.customer_id
JOIN (
    SELECT customer_id, product_id, amount_paid,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id, product_id ORDER BY created DESC) as rn
    FROM purchases WHERE amount_paid > 0 AND product_id = 52025
) last_pay ON last_pay.customer_id = ps.customer_id AND last_pay.product_id = ps.product_id AND last_pay.rn = 1
WHERE ps.product_id = 52025
  AND last_pay.amount_paid < 500
GROUP BY last_pay.amount_paid
ORDER BY last_pay.amount_paid

name: Churn Timeline
sql:
SELECT
    c.full_name as name,
    c.email,
    p.product_name as product,
    printf('$%.2f', p.amount_paid) as last_amount,
    date(p.created) as cancelled_payment,
    p.is_stripe_subscription as stripe_sub
FROM purchases p
JOIN customers c ON c.id = p.customer_id
WHERE p.is_canceled = 1
  AND p.recurring_type IS NOT NULL
  AND p.amount_paid > 0
ORDER BY p.created DESC

name: Purchase Details (Rich)
sql:
SELECT
    c.full_name as name,
    p.product_name,
    printf('$%.2f', p.amount_paid) as amount,
    date(p.created) as date,
    p.is_canceled,
    p.is_paused,
    p.is_active,
    p.trial,
    p.new_order,
    p."returning",
    p.is_stripe_subscription as stripe_sub,
    p.expires_at
FROM purchases p
JOIN customers c ON c.id = p.customer_id
WHERE p.amount_paid > 0
ORDER BY p.created DESC
